Definition: A unique identifier for the occurrence record (e.g., gbifID = 4102173295 for a Lepidium barnebyanum record).
Recommended_Standards: String; Globally unique (e.g., URI or UUID); Recommended: Use persistent identifiers like GBIF gbifID.

Definition: The specific nature of the data record (e.g., PreservedSpecimen, HumanObservation, indicating whether it is a physical specimen or observation).
Recommended_Standards: String; Controlled vocabulary: Darwin Core basisOfRecord terms (e.g., 'PreservedSpecimen', 'HumanObservation', 'MaterialSample'); Recommended: Use standardized terms from TDWG list.

Definition: An identifier for the record within the collection or dataset (e.g., a specimen number like SRP034726 for a Lepidium barnebyanum voucher).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Unique within the collection; Format: Alphanumeric, e.g., 'SRP034726'.

Definition: The name(s) of the individual(s) who collected the specimen or made the observation.
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use full names or standardized identifiers (e.g., ORCID); Multiple names separated by '|'.

Definition: The date-time when the event (e.g., collection of Lepidium barnebyanum) occurred.
Recommended_Standards: String or DateTime; Recommended: ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2025-05-23T12:09:00' or '2025-05-23'); Range allowed (e.g., '2025-05-01/2025-05-31').

Definition: The number of individuals of the organism present at the time of the occurrence.
Recommended_Standards: Integer or Decimal; Recommended: Non-negative number; Unit specified if needed via organismQuantityType.

Definition: Comments or notes about the occurrence, providing additional context.
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Free text, but structured notes (e.g., key-value pairs) enhance usability.

Definition: A unique identifier for the event (e.g., a field survey collecting Lepidium barnebyanum).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Globally unique (e.g., URI or UUID); Persistent identifier preferred.

Definition: The date-time when the event took place, shared with related occurrence records.
Recommended_Standards: String or DateTime; Recommended: ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2025-05-23T12:09:00'); Range allowed.

Definition: The method or protocol used during the event (e.g., 'field survey' for Lepidium barnebyanum collection).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use controlled vocabulary or describe method clearly (e.g., 'quadrat sampling').

Definition: The numeric value of the sample size taken during the event.
Recommended_Standards: Integer or Decimal; Recommended: Non-negative number; Accompanied by sampleSizeUnit.

Definition: The unit of measurement for the sample size (e.g., 'individuals', 'square meters').
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use standard units (e.g., 'individuals', 'm2'); Controlled vocabulary encouraged.

Definition: Comments or notes about the event, providing additional details.
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Free text with optional structured format.

Definition: The geographic latitude in decimal degrees (e.g., for Lepidium barnebyanum occurrences).
Recommended_Standards: Decimal; Recommended: Range -90 to 90; Precision to 6 decimal places; WGS84 datum unless specified.

Definition: The geographic longitude in decimal degrees (e.g., for Lepidium barnebyanum occurrences).
Recommended_Standards: Decimal; Recommended: Range -180 to 180; Precision to 6 decimal places; WGS84 datum unless specified.

Definition: The reference system on which the coordinates are based (e.g., WGS84).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use standard datum name (e.g., 'WGS84', 'NAD83'); Required if coordinates provided.

Definition: The horizontal distance (in meters) from the given coordinates to the true location.
Recommended_Standards: Integer or Decimal; Recommended: Non-negative; Units in meters; Required if uncertainty exists.

Definition: The name of the country where the location is situated (e.g., 'United States' for Lepidium barnebyanum).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or alpha-3 codes (e.g., 'US') or full name.

Definition: The specific description of the place within the area (e.g., 'Utah desert' for Lepidium barnebyanum).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Detailed and specific (e.g., '10 km N of Moab, Utah').

Definition: The lower limit of the range of elevation in meters above sea level.
Recommended_Standards: Integer or Decimal; Recommended: Non-negative; Units in meters; Maximum elevation optional.

Definition: A unique identifier for the taxonomic entity (e.g., for Lepidium barnebyanum).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Globally unique (e.g., URI or LSID); Persistent identifier preferred.

Definition: The full scientific name of the taxon (e.g., Lepidium barnebyanum).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Follow ICBN or ICZN nomenclature; Include authorship if possible.

Definition: The taxonomic kingdom (e.g., 'Plantae', used in your GBIF filter).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use controlled vocabulary (e.g., 'Plantae', 'Animalia').

Definition: The taxonomic phylum (e.g., Magnoliophyta for flowering plants).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use accepted taxonomic names.

Definition: The taxonomic class (e.g., Magnoliopsida for dicots).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use accepted taxonomic names.

Definition: The taxonomic order (e.g., Brassicales for Brassicaceae).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use accepted taxonomic names.

Definition: The taxonomic family (e.g., Brassicaceae for Lepidium).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use accepted taxonomic names.

Definition: The taxonomic genus (e.g., Lepidium).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use accepted taxonomic names.

Definition: The taxonomic species (e.g., barnebyanum).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use accepted taxonomic names.

Definition: The taxonomic rank of the entity (e.g., 'species').
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use controlled vocabulary (e.g., 'species', 'genus').

Definition: The code followed for nomenclature (e.g., ICBN for plants).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use controlled vocabulary (e.g., 'ICBN', 'ICZN', 'ICNP').

Definition: A unique identifier for the identification event.
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Unique within dataset; URI or UUID preferred.

Definition: The name(s) of the individual(s) who performed the identification.
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Full names or identifiers (e.g., ORCID); Multiple names with '|'.

Definition: The date on which the identification was made.
Recommended_Standards: String or DateTime; Recommended: ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2025-05-23').

Definition: A term modifying or qualifying the identification (e.g., 'cf.' for uncertain).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use controlled qualifiers (e.g., 'cf.', 'aff.').

Definition: The status of the specimen as a type (e.g., 'holotype' for a reference specimen).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use controlled vocabulary (e.g., 'holotype', 'paratype').

Definition: A unique identifier for the individual organism.
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Globally unique (e.g., URI); Persistent identifier preferred.

Definition: A name assigned to the organism for reference.
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Descriptive or unique name.

Definition: The scope of the organism record (e.g., 'individual', 'population').
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use controlled vocabulary (e.g., 'individual', 'population').

Definition: Previous taxonomic identifications of the organism.
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: List with dates or identifiers separated by '|'.

Definition: A unique identifier for the material sample (e.g., a DNA extract).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Unique within dataset; URI or UUID preferred.

Definition: The type of material sample (e.g., 'DNA extract' from a Lepidium barnebyanum voucher).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use controlled vocabulary (e.g., 'DNA', 'tissue').

Definition: A unique identifier for the relationship between resources.
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Unique within dataset; URI preferred.

Definition: An identifier for the related resource (e.g., another occurrence).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Matches an existing resourceID (e.g., occurrenceID).

Definition: The nature of the relationship (e.g., 'sameAs', 'derivedFrom').
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use controlled vocabulary (e.g., 'sameAs', 'derivedFrom').

Definition: A unique identifier for the measurement or fact.
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Unique within dataset; URI preferred.

Definition: The type of measurement (e.g., 'temperature' at a collection site).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use controlled vocabulary (e.g., 'temperature', 'pH'); URI for ontology terms preferred.

Definition: The value of the measurement (e.g., '25C' for temperature).
Recommended_Standards: String, Integer, or Decimal; Recommended: Match measurementType (e.g., numeric for 'temperature'); URI for controlled values.

Definition: The unit of the measurement (e.g., 'Celsius' for temperature).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use standard units (e.g., 'Celsius', 'meters'); URI for controlled units preferred.

Definition: A unique identifier for the geological context.
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Unique within dataset; URI preferred.

Definition: The earliest eon or lowest eonothem (e.g., 'Phanerozoic').
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use controlled vocabulary from geological time scales.

Definition: The name of the geological formation (e.g., a rock layer).
Recommended_Standards: String; Recommended: Use accepted geological formation names.
